summary: Iteration 31 - PersonalizedPillarSection Component Testing across all 6 pillar pages. Feature working on 5/6 pages (Care, Stay, Learn, Enjoy, Fit). Travel page requires explicit pet selection before showing the section (by design).

integration_issues.issue: Section only shows after user explicitly selects a pet from the header dropdown. Unlike other pillar pages that auto-populate with first pet, Travel page requires user interaction.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

action_items: OPTIONAL: Consider auto-selecting first pet on Travel page to show PersonalizedPillarSection without requiring user interaction (consistent with other pillar pages)
Add aria-describedby to DialogContent component for accessibility compliance
critical_code_review_comments: PersonalizedPillarSection component is well-structured with PILLAR_CONFIGS for all pillars
Modal opens correctly and shows pet info + 'Send to Concierge®' button
All item cards show 'Concierge® creates' label as required
Horizontal scroll buttons work on desktop viewport (appear on hover)
Heart/favorite icons present on each card

success_rate.frontend: 100% (5/5 pillar pages auto-show section, Travel page requires pet selection)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with pet
context_for_next_testing_agent: PersonalizedPillarSection works on all pillar pages. Care, Stay, Learn, Enjoy, Fit pages auto-show section for logged-in users with pets. Travel page uses selectedPets state (requires explicit pet selection via header dropdown). Modal opens on item click, shows pet info, description, special requests textarea, and 'Send to Concierge®' button. Horizontal scroll buttons visible on hover (desktop).

features_verified.care_page_section: PASS - 'CARE ESSENTIALS FOR MYSTIQUE' with 6 items
features_verified.stay_page_section: PASS - 'STAY COMFORTS FOR MYSTIQUE' with 6 items
features_verified.travel_page_section: CONDITIONAL PASS - Requires pet selection first

features_verified.enjoy_page_section: PASS - 'PLAY ESSENTIALS FOR MYSTIQUE' with 6 items
features_verified.fit_page_section: PASS - 'FITNESS GEAR FOR MYSTIQUE' with 6 items
features_verified.modal_on_item_click: PASS - Opens with pet info, description, special requests
features_verified.concierge_creates_label: PASS - All item cards show 'Concierge® creates'
features_verified.scroll_buttons_desktop: PASS - Left/right scroll buttons visible on hover
